dialogos.texto_en: Running like this on a trip makes \nthe scenery feels fresh and fun!
Well, I can't, really enjoy, the scenery\nwhen I'm...trying my best...to keep up with you.
Aww, what a waste then.\nWe're running through the streets of Okinawa,\nlet's at least enjoy the fresh air.
If that's...the case...can you...slow down a bit more?\nI don't...have running gear...like you do.
Okay, okay.\nI'll slow down a bit.
(What a relief...)
Haah, haah...\nHey...don't you think...it's a bit strange...to go for a run\nduring a trip? Most people...don't do that.
That may be true?\nBut...
But?
Well, I was thinking that in the future,\nmaybe this could become a regular thing we do?
Huh? What do you mean?
You don't have to worry about it, Futaro-kun!\nNot right now, at least.
(What the hell...?)
But anyways, it's pretty empty now\ncompared to yesterday afternoon,\nwhen there were so many people around.
Well, it is early in the morning.
Most shops are still closed...
Oh, that's right!\nWe have to search for souvenirs again today.\nWe couldn't find any yesterday.
Yeah...
But today we're going to Ocean Expo Park,\nso it might be hard to spend a lot of time\nlooking around shops.
Okay...
(Uuugh... Ichika has so much energy to talk...\n Meanwhile, I'm over here about to cry \n from my lack of physical strength.)
I don't want to do this every day,\nbut I think it would be better for me \nto go for a run every once in a while.
Really?\nThen occasionally, you can go for a run with me.
Well, if it's just occasionally.\nI want to improve my stamina a bit too.
Definitely!\nBut I'll cry in shock if I hear you say that \nyou're skipping a day cause you're tired, okay?
I won't say that.
(But seriously... What kind of situation is\n she imagining? I don't really get it, but Ichika\n looks like she's having fun, so I guess it's fine.)
Alright! I'm starting to feel pumped up,\nso should we run a bit more than planned?
I have to train you so we can run together more often.
H-hey, wait...a minute!\nI can't just...suddenly run long distances!\nI need my energy for sightseeing!
